property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Python313\;C:\Program Files\Python312\Scripts\;C:\Program Files\Python312\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\PuTTY\;D:\Software\terraform_1.6.5_windows_386\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Program Files\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.6\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Amazon\AWSCLIV2\;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Links;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Roaming\npm;.

testcase.name: runScenario["Get user list", "Reqres User API automation"](1)
testcase.system-out: @reqres @smoke @get @regression Scenario: Get user list &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/request_user.feature:5&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI set &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGET&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m endpoint for &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"users"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m in ReqRes API&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.api.stepdefinitions.ReqResSteps.i_set_endpoint(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI send a GET HTTP request&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.api.stepdefinitions.ReqResSteps.i_send_get_request()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.api.stepdefinitions.ReqResSteps.the_status_code_should_be(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mresponse should match JSON schema &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"reqres_users_schema.json"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.api.stepdefinitions.ReqResSteps.response_schema_check(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. log4j:WARN Continuable parsing error 2 and column 30 log4j:WARN Document root element "Configuration", must match DOCTYPE root "null". log4j:WARN Continuable parsing error 2 and column 30 log4j:WARN Document is invalid: no grammar found. log4j:ERROR DOM element is - not a <log4j:configuration> element. log4j:WARN No appenders could be found for logger (org.apache.http.impl.conn.BasicClientConnectionManager). log4j:WARN Please initialize the log4j system properly. log4j:WARN See http://logging.apache.org/log4j/1.2/faq.html#noconfig for more info.

testcase.name: runScenario["Create a new user", "Reqres User API automation"](2)
testcase.system-out: @reqres @smoke @post @smoke Scenario Outline: Create a new user &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/request_user.feature:20&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI set &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mPOST&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m endpoint for &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"users"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m in ReqRes API&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.api.stepdefinitions.ReqResSteps.i_set_endpoint(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI provide JSON payload from &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"create_user_1.json"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.api.stepdefinitions.ReqResSteps.i_provide_payload(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI send a POST HTTP request&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.api.stepdefinitions.ReqResSteps.i_send_post_request()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m201&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.api.stepdefinitions.ReqResSteps.the_status_code_should_be(int)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Update a user", "Reqres User API automation"](3)
testcase.system-out: @reqres @smoke @put @json @regression Scenario: Update a user &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/request_user.feature:23&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI set &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mPUT&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m endpoint for &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"users/2"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m in ReqRes API&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.api.stepdefinitions.ReqResSteps.i_set_endpoint(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI provide JSON payload from &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"update_user.json"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.api.stepdefinitions.ReqResSteps.i_provide_payload(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI send a PUT HTTP request&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.api.stepdefinitions.ReqResSteps.i_send_put_request()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.api.stepdefinitions.ReqResSteps.the_status_code_should_be(int)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Delete a user", "Reqres User API automation"](4)
testcase.system-out: @reqres @smoke @delete @regression Scenario: Delete a user &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/request_user.feature:30&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI set &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mDELETE&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m endpoint for &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"users/2"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m in ReqRes API&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.api.stepdefinitions.ReqResSteps.i_set_endpoint(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI send a DELETE HTTP request&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.api.stepdefinitions.ReqResSteps.i_send_delete_request()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m204&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.api.stepdefinitions.ReqResSteps.the_status_code_should_be(int)&amp#27;[0m
